title: Luffy Heads for the Plaza
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is luffy heads for the plaza.
scene: The scene follows luffy heads for the plaza, keeping the focus on Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Father ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Megalo !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shaaa AAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We have to go and help him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait, please !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshi!! Megalo, stop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But, Boss jimbei-sama ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy- Run, your Highness... If you could both hold on a little longer...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one thing hordy fears the most in the current Ryuguguu kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...is the talent that you possess.

dialogue.speaker: New Fish-Man Pirates
dialogue.text: He knows that no matter how 'Perfect' a new fish-man Island he manages to build...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it will never be able to stand up against an assault by the sea kings....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's holding the King Hostage as a form of protection against that assault...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NYUUUULU... HORDY doesn't want to capture you and use your power for himself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... He's too afraid of the threat that your power presents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why he joined forces with decken, a man with the perfect power to take your life with!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HORDY is the kind of man who will eliminate anything that stands in his way....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have heard all about this power I am supposed to possess...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you must understand, I have never actually spoken to a sea king in all of my life....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still do not feel sure that I even have the ability to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I see. Then we must make sure...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that hordy does not find out about this fact. It is to our advantage if he fears the worst...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shark!! Take me to the ryuuguu Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji! You take care of crybaby for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait, Luffy- Kun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and your crew must not do battle with HORDY!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Is it... Because we're humans?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you two say it!! That just makes things more confusing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is correct ...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Your involvement would only serve to fuel the bad feeling against humans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You must leave this to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jimbe!! That man has captured my friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't do something about that Hardy, my friendsand everyone else will be in trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going!! If you really want me to stop...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...then you'll have to make me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As a one- time comrade, I had hoped that you would listen to reason...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I suppose I was foolish. You truly are that man's brother...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you refuse to back down... then you leave me no choice....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Q:Hello everybody, greetings from me. Man-- It's starting to get really hot, don't you think? It's almost summer I see. (It's actually winter) Hmm- when it's summer, you really start craving for it. You know, Chinese Food. Oh? I see a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly... this is outrageous! First we make a narrow escape from a doing kranen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I said give up on it already

summary: Luffy Heads for the Plaza. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
